name: Tai Hing Group Holdings Limited
summary: Tai Hing Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a multi-brand casual dining restaurant company. It has a network of 213 restaurants in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Macau, and Taiwan under the Tai Hing, TeaWood, Trusty Congee King, Men Wah Bing Teng, Ph? L?, Tokyo Tsukiji, Fisher & Farmer, Rice Rule, Hot Pot Couple, King Fong Bing Teng, Asam Chicken Rice, Dao Cheng, Winter Joy, White Little, and Dimpot brands. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong. Tai Hing Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Chun Fat Company Limited.
